description: The Kree initiate the brutal 'renewal,' where low-earning humans must kill or be killed. Inside Grill's shop, Coulson, Mack, and Yo-Yo attempt to trade for metrics, but when violence spills in, Grill abandons them to save himself. May, Tess, and the others are caught in the chaos as the renewal escalates, forcing Tess to kill to protect the group. Surviving the deadly ritual, Grill claims the S.H.I.E.L.D. agents as his workers to avoid further scrutiny from the Kree.

transcript.line: Is this about my team?
It's much worse. It's a renewal.
I feel less good about this.
What's a renewal?
A low-earner will be selected. Their Metric will turn red. Then they owe a life, their own or someone else's.
A life spent...
A life earned!
Come on! Move!
Let's go. Come on!
What's going on? It sounds like people are dying out there.
A life is owed. Now, we stay safe in here, but if that fails, we make sure they find you first.
Oh, thank God. Thank God.
Hey!
You gonna leave us here to die?!
That's the hope.
If we don't, you and me are gonna have a conversation.
Where's an axe when you need one, huh?
Still too soon.
That's not something to joke about.
Where's Grill? Grill! My tab was low 'cause you didn't pay me! Now you owe me a life!
I left you three out there.
Grill's the one you want. Don't forget that.
He's got to come out sometime, right?
He strung you up for me? That's twisted.
Aah!
I'm sorry. I owe a life. Aah!
He didn't have to die.
Somebody did.
Is this the last life owed?
Yes, Commander.
This is unformatted. Who are you?
I've been recalibrating their Metrics, but I do pledge that they work for me, sir.
Is this true? Where's your station?
It's true. We work in Salvage.
They owe me a sizable debt, sir, so they will be stationed here a long time.
Hmm. Carry on.
I am happy you came to your senses, and I will be happy to call the watch commander back if not.
Trying to preserve humanity. Feels like they lost it a long time ago.
